title: Game Discs
description: Play game classics inside Minecraft with new Game Console
body:
🏆 _CurseForge modjam - Modding madness   WINNER_ 🏆




# About the mod

The GameDiscs Mod brings a whole new level of fun to Minecraft by adding a retro gaming console right into the game! Dive into the world of your favorite classic games without ever leaving Minecraft. Craft this awesome console and relive gaming history inside the blocky universe. Ready to power up and play? The adventure awaits! 


GameDiscs Mod – Play the classics, craft the memories!



# The Adventure begins...

You can obtain the gaming console by the following crafting recipes:

    ![Game Console Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c80eaa04bc420f70c6bc9ab41e06a75d9e4dbb7.png)

![Display Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bac1f9d9ae7d75627c00638817ed0b7f68bd1a1.png)

![Redstone Circuit Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9e1d54a7cb2f2f49765d819375f764af5bf63e9.png)

![Processor Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a422c0ac8054426716574580cf7147c10eda286a.png)

![Battery Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bde07fff7bf061ba114d10aa690845055dbc12e.png)

![Control Pad Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db77b9c8bbd12b5d50c6a1e39c4d02e2782bd8f.png)


Games can be found in chests in the following structures
- Monster Room
- Stronghold
- End City
- Woodland Mansion
- Buired Treasure
- Bastion
- Ruined Portal
- Ancient City
- Mineshaft
- Jungle Pyramid
- Desert Pyramid

In each of these chest there is 10% chance for a Game Disc to generate



If a Bee, Slime, Frog or Rabbit is killed by a Skeleton, they have a 100% chance to drop their corresponding Game Disc



# How to...

To play games with the gaming console you need to have the games in your inventory. Right click with the Gaming Console to open the menu and choose your favourite game with W and S keys, to enter the game press Space or Enter and start playing with the basic controls like W, S, A, D, SPACE, ENTER,  or even with the Quit button (Q) or Reset button (R).



# Current games (more in the furture):

## Flappy Bee

Flap with your bee, and avoid the pipes

![Flappy Bee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c7a984fbb4b73886d7c6b4c3bd0ccdd684d3167.png)

Flap with SPACE or ENTER

## Slime

Control your long slimy body, and eat the apples

Don't break into yourself

![Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a0016a375b20f5f9b467f53127fa9a4b2cbc4cb.png)

Change direction with W, S, A and D

## Blocktris

Fit the pieces into small space, and fill lines to get points

![BlockTris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/674d3f84cf6979e32c47e48ab78d326d73b6fb03.png)

Move with A and D, rotate with W, move down with S, hard drop with SPACE, and hold with ENTER

## TNTsweeper

Make this place safe again

Dig out safe tiles, and reveal underground TNTs by knowing how many of them are around digged out tiles. You win when all safe tiles are digged out, and all TNTs are marked with flags.
Try to don't blow up yourself :)

![TNT-Sweeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/746929087e6dbeb054b17e9e7c45ec8a21433dc2.png)

Move selection frame with W, S, A and D. Dig with SPACE, and place/remove flag with ENTER

## Pong

Move your paddle, and don't let the ball get past you

![Pong](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9004e0da27d524ed55bf92fa76c5bf109175486c.png)

Move the paddle with W and S

## Froggie

Make it all the way home with all five frogs

Cross the rails, don't get hit by a minecart, jump over the logs and turtles in the river

![Froggie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdeb207702f71e07c5f45f0a8b24becf548beac8.png)

Jump with W, S, A and D

## Rabbit

Travel the desert

Run, and avoid the cactus

![Rabbit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ba70b7a3c24e6288841fa388717c7530303f372.png)

Jump with Enter or Space

# FAQ

Q: Will there be more games in future?

A: We are very small team, and we have lot of ideas for other mods. We would like to make more games, but it's not our priority now.



Q: What about other minecraft versions?

A: About newer versions of minecraft, we are planning to update all mods, including Game Discs. But it will take some time.



Q: Will there be Doom?

A: Most likely not. But if I will get lot of free time, it would be fun for me to make it. If you want you can support me on ko-fi, so I can more focus on improving my mods, and creating new ones



# Got Feedback? We'd Love to Hear It!

Join our official [Discord] server and share your thoughts, bug reports, and suggestions! Be part of our community, connect with players, and have fun with new friends (and old ones too). See you there!
